MokebyarApi.Path: cd api_publish && dotnet dev-certs https --clean && dotnet dev-certs https --trust && dotnet dev-certs https -v -ep .\openiddict.pfx -p "988efe58-1879-405a-b3e4-15c7fdcf8980" && dotnet MokebyarApi.HttpApi.Host.dll --urls https://0.0.0.0:44353
MokebyarApi.Name: Mokebyar API

MokebyarPlatform.Path: npx local-web-server --directory mokebyar --spa index.html --https --port 5173 --rewrite "/api/(.*) -> https://localhost:44353/api/$1" --rewrite "/connect/(.*) -> https://localhost:44353/connect/$1" --rewrite "/.well-known/(.*) -> https://localhost:44353/.well-known/$1"
MokebyarPlatform.Name: Mokebyar Platform
